detail.description:
Search It – Hidden Objects is a hidden object and seek-and-find puzzle game where you search for hidden items, solve mysteries, and enjoy a relaxing find objects experience.

Step into the shoes of a detective and sharpen your I Spy skills as you explore beautifully crafted scenes. Every level is a new scavenger hunt filled with cleverly hidden objects in detailed, abstract environments.
